channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

item.title: After a rocky six years, Sony cancels future single-player PC game releases - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. After a rocky six years, Sony cancels future single-player PC game releases  Ars Technica

  5. Sorry, first-party PlayStation games aren't coming to PC anymore  Engadget

item.title: Google Search rolls out Gemini’s Canvas in AI Mode to all US users - TechCrunch
item.description:

item.title: "We're Not Hiding Anything," Crimson Desert Rep Says As Players Demand Console Footage - GameSpot
item.description:
